extra.message: User-controlled input 'username' from the query parameter is directly concatenated into a Jinja2 template string and rendered. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI). An attacker can inject malicious Jinja2 expressions like {{config}} or {{self.__class__.__mro__[1].__subclasses__()}} to access internal objects, read files, or execute arbitrary code on the server.

cwe: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
